completed_slice.action: Add and test a deterministic observation collector that converts a candidate Cloudflare Pages hostname into retained DNS, HTTP, served-identity, and exact-commit manifest evidence for the existing classifier.
completed_slice.verification: Three deterministic tests passed in an isolated Node runtime. A live probe from the available runtime could not resolve mirror-cartographer-research.pages.dev; this is retained as a limited observation, not global nonexistence proof.

remaining_blocker: Configure the cloudflare-research GitHub environment with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, dispatch the committed deployment workflow, use Cloudflare-returned project metadata or deployment URL as hostname authority, run the collector, then run classify-hostname-resolution.mjs over the retained observation.
next_acceptance: Cloudflare control-plane returns the exact project or deployment hostname
collector retains DNS and HTTP observations
served deployment manifest binds the exact repository commit
hostname classifier returns deployed-commit-served with accepted=true
